text:
Once upon a time, there was a humble squirrel named Poppy. She lived in a great oak tree in the heart of an ancient forest, surrounded by leaves of every color and flowers that danced in the gentle wind.

Poppy was a curious creature. Every morning she would swing from branch to branch, gathering acorns, nibbling on delicious hazelnuts. Her favorite pastime was climbing down to the forest floor to explore - she adored adventures.

One sunny afternoon, while exploring a forgotten path, Poppy stumbled upon an old, rusted key hanging from a branch. It had writing on it, words illegible except for one - 'Lady Midnight.' Intrigued, Poppy decided to investigate.

Later that night, under the full moon, Poppy found herself at a strange little cottage nestled between ancient oaks. An old woman stood by a hearth, knitting. "Well, what have we here?" she remarked, peering at Poppy.

Poppy introduced herself
